_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Accordian
_meta.description: The RUIXEN UI Accordion is a fully accessible, lightweight, and responsive component designed to deliver structured content like FAQs or feature explanations in a clean, elegant layout. Built with WAI-ARIA guidelines, it supports seamless keyboard navigation and screen readers out of the box. Its minimal design, smooth toggle animation, and customizable icons make it a perfect fit for modern web apps. Whether you're building a dashboard, landing page, or documentation site, this accordion blends performance with accessibility—crafted the RUIXEN way.
